reviews.review_title: I lost my pro mod menu
reviews.review_description: Look I'm just gonna say it, I don't really like the new game this had become, I know some people like the update but for me, it's the worst transition people can disagree with me but I'm gonna list down why I don't like it 1: I always loved the lethal ape version of the game it became but when it transitioned to being primal fear, I was heartbroken. 2: I lost my mod menu when it transitioned to being the game it is now which was much more annoying than anything because I paid for the mod menu with my own money and it just went down the drain in a instant. Conclusion and how they can fix this: so, the conclusion is that I am not happy with the change but how they can fix this is that they can make a legacy game.

Primal Fear" is a thrilling and intense game that delves deep into the realm of survival horror. Developed by Dagestan Technology, this game takes players on a journey through a post-apocalyptic world where humans are forced to fight for survival against hordes of mutated creatures and the harsh elements.

The gameplay in "Primal Fear" is both challenging and rewarding, with players having to navigate dangerous environments, scavenge for resources, and fend off relentless enemies. The level of difficulty in the game is balanced perfectly, providing a sense of accomplishment when overcoming each new obstacle.

One of the standout features of "Primal Fear" is its stunning graphics and immersive sound design. The environment is beautifully rendered, with detailed textures and atmospheric lighting that create a truly immersive experience. The sound design is equally impressive, with eerie ambient noises and heart-pounding music that adds to the tension and keeps players on edge.

The story of "Primal Fear" is compelling and engaging, with a dark and mysterious narrative that keeps players hooked from start to finish. As players progress through the game, they uncover the secrets of the post-apocalyptic world and must make difficult decisions that impact the fate of themselves and those around them.

The combat in "Primal Fear" is fast-paced and intense, requiring players to think quickly on their feet and use their wits to outsmart their enemies. The variety of weapons and tools available to players allows for a diverse range of strategies, from stealthy sneak attacks to all-out gunfights.

Overall, "Primal Fear" is a must-play game for fans of survival horror and post-apocalyptic settings. With its challenging gameplay, stunning visuals, and engaging story, this game is sure to keep players on the edge of their seats from beginning to end. If you're looking for a game that will test your survival skills and keep you on the edge of your seat, look no further than "Primal Fear, but I think lethal ape is better but this is still good

He kept begging me back in but just kept using my game to get help.  Then he got NickTheBrik, very toxic, lies and he doxxed me.  Then Woah Cyber, lied to get admin then banned 21 people, came back, then betrayed us again.  He lies and manipulates.  Now they all hack IPs, threaten to doxx to get what they want.  Get into your computer files with trojan horses.  Very dangerous to play their games.  If they want something or frame you to get what they want.  Just stay low key and you'll be ok.

Super fun! I have been searching for a quality gorilla tag horror game ever since capuchin went down, and this is it! I’ve tried so many others including Apes, but they just weren’t that good, but this is phenomenal!! Please fix/update this though, because level 3 doesn’t work, other than that the game is PERFECT.
